note: Each prompt = brand.json.styleSignature (or styleSignatureWhiteBg for cutouts) + subjectPrompt. Scenes -> imgkit webp. Cutouts (logo/mark/icons/chrome/host/seal/before-after) -> fal bg removal then imgkit alpha. Image CTA -> recraft-v3 then fal bg + imgkit alpha. One shared --seed (84217) across stills. Single-hue volt-lime accent only.

assets.subjectPrompt: Horizontal logo lockup on a plain flat MID-GRAY background: a bold angular volt-lime (#c8f135) lightning/surge bolt mark on the LEFT, the heavy condensed wordmark 'SURGE' in WHITE on ONE single line to its right. Athletic, aggressive, sport brand. Only that word, no tagline, no extra icons.
A single bold angular volt-lime (#c8f135) lightning/surge bolt emblem inside a rounded charcoal squircle, glossy sport-brand app icon, centered, plain flat mid-gray background, no text.

A powerful athlete mid-effort in a dark gym, ripping a battle-rope slam or explosive kettlebell swing, rim-lit by hard volt-lime edge light, sweat and chalk dust flying, motion blur, deep negative space on the LEFT for headline copy. Cinematic, raw power.

Seamless looping animation. Preserve artwork. Chalk dust and sparks drift and swirl, sweat sheen glistens, volt-lime rim light pulses subtly, the athlete's muscles flex with micro-motion, slow gentle camera push-in parallax. No large body movements, no scene change, no cuts. Premium sport idle loop.

Vertical 9:16 seamless loop. Preserve artwork. Athlete reps a clean kettlebell/dumbbell movement with controlled tempo, chalk dust drifts, volt rim light shimmers, subtle camera bob. Seamless loop, no cuts.
Vertical portrait: an athlete mid-rep with a kettlebell in a dark gym, rim-lit volt-lime, chalk dust, sweat, motion energy, dramatic.

Coach Mara Vance: a confident athletic woman head strength coach in her mid-30s, fitted charcoal training top, arms crossed, strong posture, slight smile, rim-lit with volt-lime edge light, full upper body, looking at camera. Plain flat mid-gray studio background.
Coach Mara Vance coaching in a dark gym, holding a clipboard/tablet, volt-lime rim light, athletic, encouraging, cinematic, space on one side.
